nasb.text: “Yet your fellow citizens say, ‘The way of the Lord is not right,’ when it is their own way that is not right.

esv.text: “Yet your people say, ‘The way of the Lord is not just,’ when it is their own way that is not just.

cnv.text: “你本國的人還說：‘主所行的不公平。’其實他們所行的才是不公平。

ccb.text: “你的同胞却说，主这样做不公平。其实是他们自己行事不公。
